reports.title: The Clock Trump Can't Stop
reports.subtitle: Iran sent a new peace proposal to Pakistan. Trump called it insufficient. Congress's 60-day War Powers deadline is still ticking.

reports.title: Who Gets to Stay Is Now a Question of Presidential Mood
reports.subtitle: The Supreme Court is deciding whether the executive branch can revoke Temporary Protected Status for 700,000 people whenever it wants, with no judicial review.

reports.title: The 5th Circuit Rewrites Who Gets an Abortion
reports.subtitle: A federal appeals court just restored an in-person requirement for mifepristone, cutting off mail-order access for women in rural and restricted-access states.

reports.title: The Special Relationship, Invoiced
reports.subtitle: UK exports to the US fell 25% after Liberation Day tariffs. Britain now runs a trade deficit with its largest trading partner. Polymarket says there is only a 22% chance of a deal before 2027.

reports.title: The Workers Who Could Break the AI Boom
reports.subtitle: Samsung's largest-ever labor action threatens to disrupt HBM memory production at the exact moment AI chip demand has outpaced every forecast.
